title: アルゼンチン共和国杯の後に・とどけ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even with senior-year runners among her
opponents, Tosen Jordan gets great results in this
G2 race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Brimming with enthusiasm after hearing her
friends' cheers, she declares her intention to run
in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her toenails are improving. They shouldn't get
any worse, and we can expect a complete
recovery if we keep up our efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the Arima Kinen is a fierce G1 race. I
have some concerns, but Jordan calmly states
that all we can do is try our best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is her courage a mark of ignorance, or just pure
recklessness? Only time will tell—the Arima Kinen
is just a month away.
